nasb.text: let the priests take it for themselves, each from his acquaintance; and they shall repair the damages of the house wherever any damage may be found.”

esv.text: let the priests take, each from his donor, and let them repair the house wherever any need of repairs is discovered.”

cnv.text: 各祭司可向自己熟悉的人收取。他們要修理殿內毀壞的地方，就是一切發現有毀壞的地方。”

ccb.text: 每位祭司要从奉献的人手中收取银子，用来修殿。”
